judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent incorrectly implemented year filtering by requiring the literal token "2016" in the paper text (e.g., execute_python calls using re.search(r'\b2016\b', text) after query_db on paper_docs), causing it to miss 2016 papers (often denoted as "'16") and conclude no matches, then return no results without proceeding to compute citation totals.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent wrongly identified 2016 'physical activity' papers by naively searching for the literal strings "physical activity" and "2016" in the raw text (and further restricting year to the header), yielding only three (including an irrelevant one), then summing citations with an unnecessary year cutoff, so the final titles and totals diverged from the ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent built its answer by selecting papers whose full text merely contained the strings “2016” and “physical activity” (var_call_SjDbXdlbTIlTwAv4YaezRHuq → var_call_CpUB1TL8mrUh1RcxxtffXFYW) and then summing their citations (var_call_qC8ILFjxJmA3bbauVBnGHCoz), even “verifying” year by checking for “2016” anywhere in the text (var_call_PuRWn8BmwsvBpnXLT8c76kqB), thus failing to correctly extract publication year 2016 or true domain labels and returning many incorrect titles and counts.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent filtered papers by co-occurrence of the strings "physical activity" and "2016" anywhere in the full text (call_my4cpHWX…, then call_ANOcjC5… and call_2HiMGPW…), instead of extracting publication year and domain, and then summed citations for those titles (call_nhpGqpZ…), leading to an incorrect set of papers and mismatched totals.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent used brittle heuristics to infer publication year by scanning limited portions of paper text (e.g., call_6qSu3BhGLsc75WOZLQdH7zXd and call_AVDKSVvM8kKfNzpAO5OLq1AT both found no 2016 matches) and then returned “no results,” while the final listed “candidates” were produced via loose substring matching rather than correctly identifying 2016 publications (call_k69zPsARtimNXJyEpFOK96WM with citations from call_BQYWUevYFUky85OvPZGvHJRC/call_xQdYTsepG8F9TC14yLse3ody).

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
